text:
sembling that of a
frog. Effects of Leo Ascendant, Fifth Navansa: The native will have a bell-shaped head with
limited hair, charming nose and eyes, hairy body and long belly, be fierce and will have
unsightly teeth and strong and broad cheek. Effects of Leo Ascendant, Sixth Navansa: The
native will have limited, but soft hair on his physique, white and large eyes, be tall in stature,
dark in complexion, will have proven skill (only) among females, be swaggering and be
learned. Effects of Leo Ascendant, Seventh Navansa: The native will have a long face, be
sinewy, will have a prominent physique, be unfortunate in the matter of wife (or females in
general), dark-complexioned, fierce, hairy-bodied and be cunning and harsh in speech.
Effects of Leo Ascendant, Eighth Navansa: The native will be endowed with excellent
speech, firm limbs, charming and majestic looks, be undutiful, poor and crafty. Effects of Leo
